responses.question_text: What is the main reason you want to start your own business?
responses.response_value: solve-problems

responses.question_text: When you imagine your business being successful, what does that look like?
responses.response_value: A small but profitable SaaS business with 5-10 employees, where I have full ownership and work on problems I care about. Revenue around $500K, working with a tight team.

responses.question_text: How comfortable are you with taking risks?
Rate your current satisfaction in different life areas
Rank these values in order of importance to you
Describe your ideal life 10 years from now
responses.response_value: Running a bootstrapped software company from anywhere in Europe. Financially free, working 40 hours a week on products I built, with time for family and hobbies.

responses.question_text: How confident are you that you can achieve your 10-year vision?
Rate your passion and skill level for different types of work
Which causes or missions resonate most strongly with you?
Rate your current proficiency in key business skills
Describe 3 significant problems you have personally experienced
responses.response_value:
1. Repetitive customer support drowning small teams: Running an e-commerce side project, I spent 2-3 hours daily on the same shipping/return questions. Unscalable.
2. Enterprise pricing locks out SMBs: Every professional support tool starts at $75-100/agent/month — unaffordable for stores under $1M/year.
3. Generic chatbots give wrong answers: Existing AI tools can't access order data and break customer trust with incorrect automated responses.

responses.question_text: What problems do you frequently observe others struggling with?
responses.response_value: In Shopify Facebook groups: founders handling support solo, overwhelmed by repetitive queries. Common complaints — expensive enterprise tools not built for their scale, seasonal spikes destroying team morale, chatbots that can't handle e-commerce-specific questions like order tracking or size exchanges.

responses.question_text: If you started a business today, what unique value would you provide?
responses.response_value: AI customer support trained specifically on e-commerce conversations, connected to real-time order data. Resolves 70%+ of tickets automatically at $29-79/month — 10x cheaper than Zendesk. Deep Shopify integration means it can answer 'where is my order', 'how do I return this', 'is this size in stock' without human intervention.

responses.question_text: Who would be your ideal first customers?
responses.response_value: Shopify merchants doing $200K-$2M/year with 1-20 employees who handle their own support. They receive 20-100 tickets/day, mostly repetitive (shipping, returns, tracking, sizing). Currently using basic email or Tidio. Price-sensitive but will pay $50-100/month for a tool that saves 10+ hours/week.

responses.question_text: Rate the importance of these factors for your ideal business opportunity
Identify and analyze your key competitors

response_value.title: Tidio
response_value.description: Live chat + basic AI for SMBs. $19-$239/month. Good UX but AI is generic, not e-commerce trained, cannot access order data. High churn due to poor resolution rates.

response_value.title: Gorgias
response_value.description: E-commerce helpdesk for Shopify. $10-$900/month. Deep integrations but no autonomous AI resolution — still requires human agents. Expensive above 50 tickets/month.

response_value.title: Re:amaze
response_value.description: Unified messaging for DTC brands. $29-$69/month per member. Good multi-channel but no AI auto-resolution. Per-agent pricing doesn't scale.

response_value.title: Zendesk
response_value.description: Enterprise helpdesk with AI add-ons. $55-$115/agent/month. Over-engineered for SMBs, slow setup. AI features are generic, not e-commerce-specific.

response_value.title: Intercom
response_value.description: Customer messaging + AI chatbot. $74-$499/month. Beautiful UX but priced for Series A+ startups. E-commerce customization requires developer work.

responses.question_text: What will be your unique competitive advantage?
responses.response_value: Three layers of differentiation: (1) AI trained specifically on e-commerce conversations resolves queries Tidio/Gorgias cannot. (2) Real-time order management integration — AI knows shipment status and can process basic returns. (3) SMB pricing at $29-79/month versus enterprise tools at $55-115/agent/month. No other tool combines all three.

responses.question_text: How do you want to position yourself in the market?
responses.response_value: niche

responses.question_text: Create your primary customer persona
responses.response_value:
Name: Maja, 34, Shopify Fashion Store Owner

Demographics: Female, 30-40, Shopify apparel store $600K/year, 3-8 employees, Western Europe or USA.

Goals: Grow to $1.5M, launch collections quarterly, reduce operational burden.

Pains: 50-80 tickets/day, 60% are tracking/return questions. Black Friday is overwhelming. Zendesk too expensive.

Current solution: Email with canned responses and a basic Tidio chatbot that frustrates customers.

Where to find her: Shopify Facebook Groups, Klaviyo webinars, e-commerce podcasts, Product Hunt.

responses.question_text: Describe your customer's journey from problem awareness to purchase
responses.response_value: Awareness: Support overwhelm hits a breaking point (Black Friday). Consideration: Googles 'Shopify customer support automation', finds Gorgias but balks at price, discovers us via App Store or Facebook group. Decision: Free 14-day trial with no credit card, sees AI resolution rate in 24 hours. Purchase: Converts to $49/month Starter. Onboarding: Connects Shopify store, AI trains on past tickets in 20 minutes.

responses.question_text: How will you validate your customer assumptions?
responses.response_value: interviews

responses.question_text: Map your stakeholder ecosystem

response_value.customers: Shopify/WooCommerce store owners ($200K-$5M revenue, 1-50 employees). Decision makers: founders, ops managers. Influencers: e-commerce agencies, Shopify Plus partners.
response_value.suppliers: OpenAI/Anthropic for LLM inference; Shopify Partner Program for API access and app distribution; AWS/GCP for cloud hosting; Twilio for messaging integrations.
response_value.regulators: GDPR Article 22 for automated decisions; Shopify App Store review policies; CCPA for US merchants; EU AI Act implications for automated customer interactions.
response_value.community: Shopify Facebook groups (500K+ merchants); Indie Hackers SaaS community; r/shopify; E-commerce Fuel podcast; Build in Public Twitter/X community.
response_value.investors: Pre-seed angels with e-commerce or SaaS background ($50K-$300K); Tiny Capital or Calm Fund for bootstrapped SaaS; Revenue-based financing at $10K MRR.

responses.question_text: What type of problem are you primarily solving?
responses.response_value: technical

responses.question_text: How urgent is this problem for your customers?
How frequently do customers experience this problem?
responses.response_value: daily

responses.question_text: What methods will you use to validate market demand?
responses.response_value:
1. Customer interviews: 20 Shopify store owners via LinkedIn and Facebook groups. Script: current support volume, tools used, willingness to pay.
2. Concierge MVP: Manually handle AI-resolvable tickets for 3 beta stores for 2 weeks. Prove resolution rate before building automation.
3. Landing page: Measure conversion on Google Ads targeting 'Shopify customer support automation'.
4. Competitor teardown: Analyze Gorgias, Tidio, Re:amaze reviews on G2/Capterra for unmet needs.

responses.question_text: What metrics will indicate successful market validation?
responses.response_value: Green light criteria: 15 of 20 interviewees confirm paying $40-80/month for demonstrated automation; landing page converts >5% to email sign-up; 3 concierge beta stores achieve >60% AI resolution rate within 2 weeks; 2+ stores willing to pay $49/month after beta. Timeline: 6 weeks.

responses.question_text: What is your timeline for market validation?
responses.response_value: 3-months

responses.question_text: Define your primary customer segments

response_value.title: Shopify SMB Fashion & Apparel ($200K-$2M)
response_value.description: Stores with 1-20 employees, high ticket volume during drops and sales. Use email/basic chat, need AI that understands product and order queries. Price: $49-99/month via Shopify App Store.

response_value.title: WooCommerce DTC Brands ($100K-$1M)
response_value.description: Smaller, more technical segment. Use WooCommerce or custom stacks. Need content/SEO or agency partnerships to reach. Price: $29-79/month.

response_value.title: Shopify Plus merchants ($2M-$10M)
response_value.description: Higher-value accounts needing advanced automation, custom AI training, and API access. Longer sales cycle but higher LTV. Price: $199-499/month.

responses.question_text: Which customer segment will you focus on first, and why?
responses.response_value: First focus: Shopify SMB Fashion & Apparel ($200K-$2M). Rationale: (1) Easiest to reach via Shopify App Store — no outbound sales needed. (2) High immediate pain from repetitive support. (3) Our $49/month is compelling vs Gorgias pricing. (4) Fashion/apparel has predictable query patterns ideal for AI training. (5) 500K+ Shopify stores in this revenue range globally.

responses.question_text: Create your value proposition canvas
responses.response_value:
Products & Services: E-commerce AI support assistant with Shopify/WooCommerce integration and real-time order management sync.

Gain Creators: Reduces support workload by 70%+; Available 24/7; Automatically resolves tracking, return, and FAQ queries; Frees founder time for growth.

Pain Relievers: Eliminates repetitive ticket handling; 10x cheaper than enterprise tools; No developer required; Live within first hour.

Customer Jobs: Handle inquiries quickly; Maintain high customer satisfaction; Scale support without hiring; Manage peak seasons.

Customer Gains: 10+ hours/week saved; Higher CSAT; Lower cart abandonment from instant responses; Handle 10x ticket volume without added cost.

Customer Pains: 50-100 repetitive daily tickets; Enterprise tools cost $200+/month; Generic chatbots give wrong answers; Seasonal spikes overwhelm teams.

responses.question_text: What is your unique selling proposition (USP)?
responses.response_value: AI customer support trained on e-commerce, connected to your orders — from $29/month, live in 20 minutes.

responses.question_text: Complete your business model canvas
responses.response_value:
Key Partners: Shopify Partner Program, OpenAI/Anthropic API, WooCommerce ecosystem, 3-5 e-commerce agencies.

Key Activities: AI model training on e-commerce data, Shopify/WooCommerce integration maintenance, customer onboarding and success, content marketing and App Store optimization.

Key Resources: Fine-tuned e-commerce AI model, Shopify app listing, customer conversation dataset, founding team.

Value Propositions: 70%+ autonomous ticket resolution for e-commerce stores at SMB-friendly pricing with real-time order integration.

Customer Relationships: Self-serve via App Store, in-app onboarding, proactive success emails, live chat for paid plans.

Channels: Shopify App Store (primary), SEO content, agency partnerships, LinkedIn outbound for Shopify Plus.

Cost Structure: AI inference costs (~$0.002/ticket), team salaries (60% of costs), cloud infrastructure, Shopify Partner fees.

Revenue Streams: Monthly SaaS subscriptions Starter $29, Growth $79, Pro $199. 20% annual discount. Extra usage fees above conversation limits.

responses.question_text: What is your primary revenue model?
responses.response_value: subscription

responses.question_text: Create your financial projections
responses.response_value:
Year 1 Revenue: $60K (50 customers avg $100/month)
Year 1 Costs: $120K (2 people, cloud, AI inference)
Year 1 Net: -$60K (funded by savings)

Year 2 Revenue: $360K (200 customers avg $150/month)
Year 2 Costs: $240K (4 people, growing infrastructure)
Year 2 Net: $120K profit

Year 3 Revenue: $900K (450 customers avg $167/month)
Year 3 Costs: $450K (8 people, sales, marketing)
Year 3 Net: $450K profit

Key assumptions: 15% MoM growth Y1; 5% monthly churn; AI inference costs < 15% of revenue; Shopify App Store generates 60% of new signups.

responses.question_text: How do you plan to fund your business?
responses.response_value: bootstrap

responses.question_text: What are your key resources and capabilities?

response_value.human-resources: Founder (full-stack engineer) solo for 6 months. Month 3: part-time customer success. Month 6: AI/ML engineer. Month 12: first BD hire. Advisors: SaaS growth expert and e-commerce operator.
response_value.physical-resources: Fully remote. Home office hardware. Cloud infrastructure (AWS/GCP ~$300/month initially). No physical office planned for first 18 months.
response_value.intellectual-resources: Custom e-commerce AI fine-tune. Proprietary Shopify order data integration layer. Customer conversation training dataset. Shopify Partner and App Store listing.
response_value.financial-resources: $50K personal savings as initial runway (12 months at current burn). Revenue reinvestment from month 6. Revenue-based financing at $10K MRR.

responses.question_text: What key partnerships will you need?
responses.response_value: Priority partnerships: (1) Shopify Partner Program — critical for App Store distribution and order API access. (2) 2-3 Shopify Plus agencies — drives enterprise segment via referrals. (3) OpenAI/Anthropic — stable, affordable inference pricing. (4) Klaviyo and Yotpo integrations — enriches AI with customer behavior data. (5) Returns platforms (Loop, AfterShip) — automating return queries requires their data.

responses.question_text: How will you acquire your first customers?
responses.response_value: Month 1-2 (Concierge): Recruit 10 beta stores from Shopify Facebook groups and LinkedIn. Free for 30 days in exchange for feedback and testimonials. Month 3: Launch on Shopify App Store with free trial and 5-star beta reviews. Month 4-6: SEO content targeting 'Shopify customer support automation', 'Gorgias alternative'. Month 6+: Affiliate program offering 20% recurring commission to e-commerce influencers and agencies.

responses.question_text: What marketing channels will you use?
responses.response_value: digital-marketing

responses.question_text: What is your launch timeline?
responses.response_value: 6-months

responses.question_text: How will you validate your product concept?
responses.response_value: Build MVP with Shopify integration and basic AI. Recruit 5 beta stores for free 30-day trial. Track resolution rate, satisfaction scores, and hours saved.

responses.question_text: Who are your test users?
responses.response_value: 5 Shopify fashion/apparel stores ($200K-$1M revenue), recruited through LinkedIn and Shopify Facebook groups, currently using email-only support.

responses.question_text: What feedback mechanisms will you use?
responses.response_value: Weekly 30-min calls, in-app NPS surveys, dashboard showing resolution rate vs human escalation rate, session recordings for UX feedback.

responses.question_text: What are your key growth strategies?
responses.response_value: 1. Shopify App Store listing as primary distribution 2. SEO content targeting Shopify customer support keywords 3. Partnership with Shopify Plus agencies 4. Customer referral program.

responses.question_text: How will you allocate resources?
responses.response_value: 60% engineering, 25% sales/marketing, 15% customer success. Bootstrap first year, Series A after $500K ARR.

responses.question_text: What partnerships are essential?
responses.response_value: Shopify Partner Program, WooCommerce ecosystem, 2-3 boutique e-commerce agencies, OpenAI API partnership.

responses.question_text: How will you test your business model in the market?
responses.response_value: Shopify App Store launch with freemium. Target 100 installs in month 1, 20% free-to-paid conversion. Monitor churn, expansion revenue, CAC by channel.

responses.question_text: What metrics will you track?
responses.response_value: MRR growth, churn rate (<5% monthly), CAC by channel, LTV:CAC (3:1 target), AI resolution rate (>70% target), NPS (>50 target).

responses.question_text: What is your timeline for prototype validation?
responses.response_value: M1-2: 5 beta customers, validate AI rate. M3-4: App launch, 100 installs. M5-6: $5K MRR. M7-12: Scale to $25K MRR.
